name: Steamed Pork with Preserved Tianjin Vegetable
recipeInstructions:
Fresh pork lends itself well to steaming, either cubed, sliced or minced, and combined or topped with flavoring ingredients.
Preparation: Mix marinade. In a bowl, mix chopped pork, water chestnuts, 1/2 preserved vegetable, and marinade; mix together with your fingers - it's faster. Spread mixture on round 12-inch plate. Sprinkle with remaining preserved vegetable. Refrigerate if working in advance.
Steaming: Bring pork mixture to room temperature before steaming. Bring water in steamer to rapid boil. Steam for about 20 minutes. Sprinkle with chopped onions just before serving.
